title: Input-Aware Dynamic Timestep Spiking Neural Networks for Efficient In-Memory Computing
main_contribution: Improving accuracy of 4-timestep static SNN while reducing energy-delay-product by 80%
focus: Achieving lower energy and latency in In-Memory Computing (IMC) implemented SNNs while maintaining iso-accuracy
problem_addressed: Memory wall problem in traditional von-Neumann architectures for SNNs
